summary: Full backend + frontend testing of STMP Agri site vitrine. All 24 backend pytest tests pass (100%). All critical frontend flows work: home hero+theme toggle, products list/filter/search, article slug, contact form submit, quote form (consent validation + success card), newsletter, search dialog, admin login/dashboard/product create/logout, admin route protection.
critical_code_review_comments: seed_admin correctly updates password when changed (good).
CORS_ORIGINS='*' with allow_credentials=True is technically invalid per spec; browsers may reject cookies. Fine for JWT-Bearer usage but should be tightened for production.
JWT secret is committed in /app/backend/.env (dev fixture) — ensure rotated in prod.
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (not required by playbook because custom JWT, but consider adding).
admin/articles listing endpoint exists but no equivalent admin/realisations, admin/partners, admin/certifications GET endpoints — public GETs suffice but consider consistency.
seed_content is idempotent per collection but if partial seed data exists (e.g., 1 product), remaining seeds are skipped.
seed_data_creation: None (seed_data.py handles seeding automatically on startup). Test data created via API is prefixed TEST_.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py, pytest.ini already configured. Admin creds in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Category field in admin product dialog is a shadcn Select (not an input) — cannot .fill(), only click/select option; default value 'engrais' works fine for create tests.
